prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-LUFERTWFUB-LG-RD-AMZ-2 Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Red Fire Truck Toy Vehicle Pull Back Friction Car for Boys 3 and Up Description: A classic children’s toy, the Kidplokio Fire Truck Toy is fitted with fast-moving wheels, extendable ladders, vibrant colors, and realistic fire truck graphics, and will have toddlers and young kids roaring to the rescue.

The fire truck toy features a long rescue ladder crane that extends from the top of the truck for skyscraper rescue missions or high-in-the-sky kitty cat retrievals; your little hero and their classic red fire truck toy will be ready to save the day with endless pretend play possibilities. Whether battling an indoor house fire or responding to a forest fire, the Kidplokio Fire Truck is the perfect toy to respond to all pretend fire emergencies.

Not only will your little aspiring firefighter be thrilled and occupied for hours with this fire truck toy rescue vehicle, but they’ll also be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions.

Lastly, the fire truck toy comes ready to play pretend rescue missions right out of the box. Featuring easy-to-use pull and push friction power, kids can begin playing right away with no batteries or assembly required. This toy is made of durable, high-quality plastic that is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. Grab one of these fire truck toys for your little one this holiday season. Search Terms: fire truck toys for boys kids toy cars boys toy trucks kids toy vehicles friction cars pull back toys action adventure toys for boys 3 and up pretend play toy sets indoor play sets boys holiday gifts fire rescue roleplaying toy set imagination toys Features: - FRICTION POWERED FIRE TRUCK - Kidplokio fire truck toy is fitted with fast-moving wheels, an extendable ladder, and cool firefighting graphics; Awesome pretend play indoor toy for little kids who love trucks - 360 ROTATING RESCUE CRANE - Toy truck features a long rescue ladder crane that extends from the top of the truck for pretend skyscraper rescue missions or kitty cat retrievals; Kids will love using their imagination while saving the day during playtime - PRETEND PLAY TOY FOR BOYS - Your little aspiring firefighter will be thrilled and occupied for hours with this rescue toy vehicle; Pretend play helps kids engage in crucial early education activities like fine motor skills and cognitive development during imaginative play - PLAY RIGHT OUT OF THE BOX - The fire truck toy is ready for fun right out of the box; Featuring push and pull friction power, kids can easily start driving their truck around without any batteries or assembly required - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 16” x 3” x 3.5”; Color; red; Age recommendation: 3+ years (choking hazard - small parts); Weight: .57lbs; No batteries or assembly required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Red Fire Truck Toy Vehicle Pull Back Friction Car
